EOS.desc: ADC group regular end of sequence conversions flag

JEOS.desc: ADC group injected end of sequence conversions flag

JSTRT.desc: ADC group injected conversion start flag

STRT.desc: ADC group regular conversion start flag

AWDCH.desc: ADC analog watchdog 1 monitored channel selection

EOSIE.desc: ADC group regular end of sequence conversions interrupt

JEOSIE.desc: ADC group injected end of sequence conversions interrupt

AWDSGL.desc: ADC analog watchdog 1 monitoring a single channel or all channels

JAUTO.desc: ADC group injected automatic trigger mode

DISCEN.desc: ADC group regular sequencer discontinuous mode

JDISCEN.desc: ADC group injected sequencer discontinuous mode

DISCNUM.desc: ADC group regular sequencer discontinuous number of ranks

JAWDEN.desc: ADC analog watchdog 1 enable on scope ADC group injected

AWDEN.desc: ADC analog watchdog 1 enable on scope ADC group regular

CONT.desc: ADC group regular continuous conversion mode

JEXTSEL.desc: ADC group injected external trigger source

JEXTTRIG.desc: ADC group injected external trigger enable

EXTSEL.desc: ADC group regular external trigger source

EXTTRIG.desc: ADC group regular external trigger enable

TSVREFE.desc: ADC internal path to VrefInt and temperature sensor enable

JOFFSET1.desc: ADC group injected sequencer rank 1 offset value

JOFFSET2.desc: ADC group injected sequencer rank 2 offset value

JOFFSET3.desc: ADC group injected sequencer rank 3 offset value

JOFFSET4.desc: ADC group injected sequencer rank 4 offset value

L.desc: ADC group regular sequencer scan length

JL.desc: ADC group injected sequencer scan length

JDATA.desc: ADC group injected sequencer rank 1 conversion data
ADC group injected sequencer rank 2 conversion data
ADC group injected sequencer rank 3 conversion data
ADC group injected sequencer rank 4 conversion data

ADC2DATA.desc: ADC group regular conversion data for ADC slave, in multimode

registers.name: SR
registers.comment: ADC status register,    used for ADC multimode (bits common to several ADC instances). Address offset: ADC1 base address

registers.name: CR1
registers.comment: ADC control register 1, used for ADC multimode (bits common to several ADC instances). Address offset: ADC1 base address + 0x04

registers.name: CR2
registers.comment: ADC control register 2, used for ADC multimode (bits common to several ADC instances). Address offset: ADC1 base address + 0x08

registers.name: DR
registers.comment: ADC data register,      used for ADC multimode (bits common to several ADC instances). Address offset: ADC1 base address + 0x4C

TEC.desc: Least significant byte of the 9-bit Transmit Error Counter

USART3_REMAP_PARTIALREMAP.desc: Partial remap (TX/PC10, RX/PC11, CK/PC12, CTS/PB13, RTS/PB14)

USART3_REMAP_FULLREMAP.desc: Full remap (TX/PD8, RX/PD9, CK/PD10, CTS/PD11, RTS/PD12)

TIM1_REMAP_PARTIALREMAP.desc: Partial remap (ETR/PA12, CH1/PA8, CH2/PA9, CH3/PA10, CH4/PA11, BKIN/PA6, CH1N/PA7, CH2N/PB0, CH3N/PB1)

SWJ_CFG_NOJNTRST.desc: Full SWJ (JTAG-DP + SW-DP) but without JNTRST

CCR.desc: Clock Control Register in Fast/Standard mode (Master mode)

TRISE.desc: Maximum Rise Time in Fast/Standard mode (Master mode)

HSIRDY.desc: Internal High Speed clock ready flag

HSERDY.desc: External High Speed clock ready flag

RXNEIE.desc: RX buffer Not Empty Interrupt Enable

registers.name: SMCR
registers.comment: TIM slave Mode Control register,             Address offset: 0x08

registers.name: DIER
registers.comment: TIM DMA/interrupt enable register,           Address offset: 0x0C

registers.name: EGR
registers.comment: TIM event generation register,               Address offset: 0x14

registers.name: CCMR1
registers.comment: TIM  capture/compare mode register 1,        Address offset: 0x18

registers.name: CCMR2
registers.comment: TIM  capture/compare mode register 2,        Address offset: 0x1C

registers.name: CCER
registers.comment: TIM capture/compare enable register,         Address offset: 0x20

registers.name: RCR
registers.comment: TIM  repetition counter register,            Address offset: 0x30

registers.name: BDTR
registers.comment: TIM break and dead-time register,            Address offset: 0x44

registers.name: DCR
registers.comment: TIM DMA control register,                    Address offset: 0x48

registers.name: DMAR
registers.comment: TIM DMA address for full transfer register,  Address offset: 0x4C

registers.name: BRR
registers.comment: USART Baud rate register,                Address offset: 0x08

registers.name: GTPR
registers.comment: USART Guard time and prescaler register, Address offset: 0x18
